title: Comet ATX Recovery Validation
summary: Student documents an instructor-supervised hardware recovery validation and records safe pre-check and post-check evidence.
student_goal: Confirm that a supervised recovery workflow produced the expected result and that recovery evidence is documented clearly.

required_evidence.label: Instructor authorization
required_evidence.description: Student must document that the hardware recovery validation was authorized or directly supervised by the instructor.

required_evidence.label: Pre-action check
required_evidence.description: Student must document system state before the supervised recovery action, including service status or reachability as instructed.

required_evidence.label: Recovery action evidence
required_evidence.description: Student must document the single approved recovery action that was performed under instructor direction.

required_evidence.label: Post-action recovery check
required_evidence.description: Student must confirm the system recovered using service, network, console, or instructor-approved evidence.

student_workflow: Open the Zammad ticket and confirm the system being validated.
Open ARIA AI Mentor and load the assigned ticket.
Do not perform any hardware recovery action unless the instructor authorizes or supervises it.
Document pre-action system state before the supervised action.
Document the approved action and post-action recovery evidence.
opening_questions: Did the instructor authorize or supervise this hardware recovery validation?
What system state did you confirm before the action?
What approved recovery action was performed?
What evidence shows the system recovered correctly?
mentor_guidance_rules: Do not approve completion before instructor authorization and pre-check evidence are captured.
Do not encourage repeated or unsupervised recovery actions.
